artists.name: DO WHAT YOU LOVE
artists.bio: Sergey Gordienko, known as the “Do What You Love” Artist, is a Miami-based multidisciplinary visual artist with over 20 years of experience. His vibrant works span canvases, murals, wearable art, and NFTs, promoting his philosophy of pursuing passion as the key to fulfillment. A crypto art pioneer since 2017, his pieces, including one in the Mayor of Miami’s office, blend art and blockchain innovation. Featured in Forbes and exhibited globally, Sergey is also a speaker at tech conferences and a philanthropist, supporting various charities. He leads a sustainable lifestyle, practices wellness, and enjoys chess and time with his dog, Magic.
artists.biography: Sergey Gordienko, aka the “Do What You Love” Artist, is a renowned multidisciplinary visual artist with over 20 years of experience. Based in Miami, Florida, Sergey’s vibrant and energetic works are infused with his core message: “DO WHAT YOU LOVE.” He believes that pursuing one’s passion is the key to happiness and fulfillment, a philosophy he passionately conveys through his art. His creations, known for their distinctive style and vibrant colors, range across various media, including canvases, murals, wearable art, and digital NFTs. Sergey pioneered the crypto art movement in 2017, inspired by the rise of blockchain technology. His crypto art piece even graces the Mayor of Miami’s office wall. Recognized by Forbes and other media outlets, Sergey’s art has been showcased in prestigious exhibitions in the US and Europe. He is also an active speaker at top crypto and tech conferences, including BTC Conference, North America Bitcoin Conference, Tulum Crypto Fest, Bitcoin Energy Summit, and Bitcoin Mining Expo. Additionally, Sergey consistently donates his artworks to numerous charity events, supporting causes such as Voice of Children, Art from the Heart Foundation, Lions Heart Foundation, and others, to make the world a better place. Beyond his artistic pursuits, Sergey leads a healthy, sustainable, and conscious lifestyle, practicing yoga, meditation, and breathwork. He practices sadhu board meditation and ice baths. Sergey is known for organizing extraordinary art shows and wellness events, bringing together talented artists, musicians, dancers, poets, and other beautiful souls to share their magic and co-create. Chess is another of his passions, and he shares his life with his beloved dog, Magic.

artists.name: INESSA
artists.bio: Inessa is a contemporary fine artist known for blending classical oil techniques with the bold colors and energy of the pop art era. Trained in Finland and at LCC University of the Arts London, her work combines traditional craftsmanship with modern influences, incorporating mixed media to add depth and texture. Inspired by the female form, pop culture, and cryptocurrency, Inessa’s art explores themes of strength, individuality, and resilience. Her dynamic style and innovative approach have made her a rising star in the global art scene.
artists.biography: Inessa is a contemporary fine artist whose work masterfully bridges the gap between classical oil techniques and the vibrant energy of the pop art era. After studying art and design in Finland, she moved to London in the early 2000s to attend the prestigious LCC University of the Arts London, where she refined her distinctive style and honed her technical skills. Her art is a bold fusion of traditional and modern elements, characterized by vivid pop-art-inspired colors, striking lines, and the rich textures of classical oil painting. By integrating mixed media components, Inessa brings depth and a tactile quality to her pieces, making each artwork a multi-dimensional experience. Inessa’s creations are deeply influenced by the power and grace of the female form, the ever-evolving world of pop culture, and the digital revolution of cryptocurrency. Through her dynamic and thought-provoking work, she explores themes of femininity, resilience, and self-expression, creating pieces that resonate with a broad audience. Her art is celebrated for its intricate details and emotive force, drawing viewers into a captivating visual narrative. Whether working on a large-scale canvas or a mixed media sculpture, Inessa consistently pushes the boundaries of contemporary fine art. Her innovative approach and dedication to her craft have established her as a rising star in the global art scene, with a growing presence in galleries and exhibitions worldwide. Inessa’s work stands as a testament to her creative vision, technical mastery, and passion for artistic exploration.

artists.name: KYLE SCHINDLER
artists.bio: Kyle Schindler is a contemporary artist known for his dynamic mixed-media wall art and sculptures inspired by 1980s pop culture. His vibrant, nostalgic pieces have earned him a growing presence in galleries across the U.S., showcasing his unique blend of bold visuals and modern artistry.
artists.biography: Kyle Schindler is a contemporary American artist whose work draws inspiration from the vibrant energy of 1980s pop culture. Specializing in mixed-media wall art and sculptures, Kyle’s creations capture the nostalgia of neon lights, graffiti, and bold visuals, offering a unique fusion of past and present. His distinctive style has garnered a growing presence in galleries across the United States, where his dynamic and innovative works resonate with collectors and art enthusiasts alike. Through his art, Kyle continues to push creative boundaries, blending traditional craftsmanship with modern influences.

artists.name: TRAN$PARENT
artists.bio: TRAN$PARENT is a one-of-a-kind artist crafting ultra-fine, museum-quality art from rare international currencies. Each piece reveals the front, back, and hidden security features of banknotes, seamlessly blending them into powerful, thought-provoking themes.
artists.biography:
Josh Leidolf is the gallery award-winning luxury currency artist known as TRAN$PARENT. Based in the Ft Lauderdale/Miami area, painting and drawing since an early age, collecting rare international currency and exploring creative photography in over 50 countries in his lifetime, his vision is to represent world currencies as vibrantly as the people who use them.

    TRAN$PARENT creates museum-quality, ultra-fine transparent currency art, depicting the front, back, and all hidden security features located in the middle of the bill in his breathtaking works. Every American denomination from the $1 to the $10,000 bill, international currencies such as Euros, Pounds, Shekels, Peso, Yuans, coins, and multiple cryptocurrency pieces are also subjects of his extraordinary work.

    TRAN$PARENT’s art was inspired by the fake news campaigns of the current right/left media outlets as a metaphor for being transparent with the people, with your loved ones, with your business associates, but most importantly with yourself. He hopes that his collectors use their pieces as a daily reminder to remain truthful and transparent no matter the situation.

    His museum-quality, fine currency art, displayed ornately framed and/or as contemporary diasec, hangs in the homes, businesses, and yachts of affluent private collectors, celebrities, famous athletes, politicians, and art enthusiasts across the nation. His clients include Dan Marino, Dwyane Wade, Pitbull, Udonis Haslem, Slightly Stoopid, Matisyahu, Gil Green, Chris Osceola, Indy Al Miller, multiple hedge fund managers, business owners, and the famous wealth money manager to the stars Jeffrey M. Fratarcangeli. His first publicly-sold piece went to one of the heads of the Seminole Indians and co-owner of the Hard Rock Hotel and Casino.

    Since going public, TRAN$PARENT has donated his art, energy, and effort to more than 25 reputable charities, including The Alzheimer’s Association, Kids in Distress, Saving Lives in Israel, The Little Lighthouse Foundation, The Boys and Girls Club, The Dan Marino Foundation, The Special Olympics, NYC Bigs and Littles Mentoring Program, charities to feed and educate underprivileged children in Haiti and Mexico, The Pancreatic Cancer and the Autism Foundations.

    His works are currently represented and on display at numerous high-end galleries in South Florida, Greenwich, CT, New York City, and the Hamptons.

artists.name: JOSEPH SKALA
artists.bio: Joseph Skala is a multidisciplinary artist whose work blends old-world painting techniques with contemporary exploration of metaphysical themes. Drawing inspiration from ancient architecture, sacred geometry, and the energetic patterns of life, his art fuses the physical and spiritual realms. Using finely detailed figures, vibrant mineral pigments, and precious metals like 24k gold, Joseph creates immersive, light-responsive pieces that evoke ancient memory and divine connection. His work invites viewers to explore the mysteries of the universe and their own inner worlds, aiming to raise collective consciousness and inspire a sense of harmony and wonder.
artists.biography: Joseph Skala is an artist deeply inspired by the mysteries of the universe and the intricate connection between the physical and metaphysical realms. He combines old-world painting techniques with contemporary themes, crafting works that weave together sacred geometry, ancient architecture, and the vibratory patterns of life. His use of finely detailed figures, luminous mineral pigments such as lapis lazuli and malachite, and precious metals like 24k gold gives his art a unique, light-responsive quality that changes with perspective and lighting. Influenced by the sacred symbolism of divine beings and relics of humanity’s forgotten past, Joseph’s art invites viewers to tap into their imagination and connect with their inner divinity. Growing up near the ancient ruins of the Anasazi in Colorado, he developed a lifelong fascination with archaeology and the mysteries of human evolution, which continue to shape his work. Through his devotion to raising collective consciousness, Joseph strives to create a more peaceful and harmonious world, offering his art as a conduit for spiritual reflection and inspiration.

artists.name: LEIDY MAZO
artists.bio: Leidy Mazo is a Miami-based artist, model, and actress, best known for her role in *Transformers: Dark of the Moon*. After moving to the U.S. at 15 and pursuing acting in Los Angeles, Leidy shifted her focus to painting, creating emotionally driven works collected by celebrities and galleries worldwide. Her art spans multiple styles, from her iconic Jewish star series inspired by her spiritual journey to her playful *Teddy Bear* collection and the powerful *Soldiers Hearts Fight for Love* series advocating peace. Known for her dynamic 3D techniques, Leidy’s work reflects her ever-evolving emotions and passion for self-expression.
artists.biography: Leidy Mazo is a multidisciplinary artist, model, and actress, best known for her role in the blockbuster film *Transformers: Dark of the Moon*. Born in Colombia, she moved to the United States at the age of 15, earning a scholarship to an art institution. Afterward, she relocated to Los Angeles to pursue acting, but her true passion has always been art. Now based in Miami, Leidy dedicates her time to painting, creating emotionally charged works that resonate with clients worldwide, including celebrities and galleries. Leidy’s artistic journey began with a profound inspiration from her religious studies, which led to her first series featuring Jewish stars. This deeply personal work marked the start of her career and her exploration of art as a means of self-expression. Over time, she developed distinct collections, such as her playful *Teddy Bear* series, incorporating luxury brand motifs, and her poignant *Soldiers Hearts Fight for Love* collection, which advocates for peace and love amid global conflict. Known for her versatility, Leidy’s style evolves with her emotions, blending traditional techniques with innovative 3D elements that bring her visions to life. She thrives on collaboration and experimentation, producing artwork that is as dynamic and multifaceted as her career. With a unique ability to translate her experiences and feelings onto canvas, Leidy continues to captivate audiences and collectors around the world.

artists.bio: CA$H MONET is a provocative artist whose work explores the intersections of wealth, culture, and art through bold, satirical imagery.

artists.name: JOHNNY DOLLAR
artists.bio: Johnny Dollar is obviously not my real name, but pseudonym, a handle. I  sign my paintings with my real name then cover my name with masking tape and sign it Johnny Dollar. The masking tape is a form of “encryption.” The “masking tape encryption” can always be removed to reveal my real identity, and is a metaphor for the false sense of privacy that we have in this brave new digital world.

items.title: Peace Maker
items.description: The happy Bitcoin Bear presents a flower of peace, with the Colt 45 revolver in the background. This gun was revolutionary technology, a game changer invention of the 19th century, often called “the great equalizer” or “the peace maker.”
